data.description: BOJ Governor Ueda Flags Significant Uncertainty Around U.S. Tariff Impact
BoJ's Governor Ueda: It would be too late to wait until all hard data becomes available to gauge us economic outlook.
BOJ Governor Ueda: Decision-Making to Include Broad Data Set, Not Just Hard Indicators
BoJ's Governor Ueda: We lack enough data to determine next year's wage outlook, as that will depend on how US economic developments affect Japan's corporate profits

data.title: FDA approves Tecentriq plus lurbinectedin for first-line maintenance in ES-SCLC, a highly aggressive disease .
data.description: On October 3, 2025, Roche disclosed that the US FDA had greenlit Tecentriq® (atezolizumab) and Tecentriq Hybreza® (atezolizumab and hyaluronidase-tqjs) combined with lurbinectedin (Zepzelca®) for upkeep therapy of adult patients with extensive-stage small cell lung cancer (ES-SCLC) post first-line induction treatment with Tecentriq or Tecentriq Hybreza, carboplatin, and etoposide (CE). This clearance signifies the first-ever combination therapy for initial maintenance of ES-SCLC, a severe ailment with limited treatment options. The NCCN Guidelines® now include this regimen as a category 2A and favored choice for maintaining ES-SCLC patients post-initial therapy with Tecentriq and CE. This approval is monumental for ES-SCLC patients as it offers a novel treatment approach.

data.title: AGAMREE® approved in Canada for Duchenne Muscular Dystrophy, 800+ patients affected; first treatment for DMD in Canada.
data.description: In Pratteln, Switzerland on October 3, 2025, Santhera Pharmaceuticals (SIX: SANN) announced Health Canada's approval of AGAMREE® (vamorolone) for treating Duchenne muscular dystrophy (DMD) in patients aged 4 years and older after Priority Review. This marks Canada's first approved treatment for DMD. According to the Canadian Neuromuscular Disease registry, over 800 boys and young men in Canada are living with DMD, facing its debilitating symptoms.

data.title: Roche announces Dr. Claudia Süssmuth Dyckerhoff will not seek re-election for Board of Directors in 2026.
data.description: Roche disclosed on 3 October 2025 that Dr. Claudia Süssmuth Dyckerhoff will not seek re-election as a Roche Board of Directors member at the 2026 Annual General Meeting. She has opted to be nominated for the board of a different healthcare industry company. ROG shares are listed on the SIX under tickers RO and ROG, while RHHBY trades on the OTCQX.

data.title: GoldenPeaks Capital and Huawei to collaborate on 500MWh BESS projects in Europe, expanding renewable energy efforts.
data.description: In SHENZHEN, China, GoldenPeaks Capital (GPC) and Huawei Polska Sp. z o.o. have recently announced a partnership by signing a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) regarding a Battery Energy Storage System (BESS) collaboration. GPC, a major independent power producer in Central Eastern Europe, will engage in a comprehensive partnership with Huawei Polska Sp. z o.o., concentrating on developing a 500MWh BESS project. The agreement was endorsed by Adriano Agosti, the Founder and Chairman of GPC, and Mr. Jianjun Zhou, Vice President of Huawei and President of Global Marketing, Sales and Services.

data.title: Sigenergy in Milan hosts 200 energy professionals for a discussion on Southern Europe's clean-energy transition, showcasing new innovations.
data.description: In Milan on October 3, 2025, Sigenergy organized a conference that brought together around 200 energy experts from Southern Europe to discuss the clean-energy transition in the region. During the conference, Sigenergy introduced its newest technologies, such as a hybrid inverter, a micro inverter, and other innovations.
